name: O.R.C. Cockroach
description: The O.R.C. Cockroach is the armored aggressive version of the cockroach in Grounded 2. It keeps the durability and shove potential of the base creature, but now fights like a true assault unit.
behavior: It patrols cramped dirty O.R.C. zones on short routes, using its wide body to close off lanes and entrances. It does not need to chase far if it already boxed you in.
interactionWithPlayer: It attacks on sight and works especially well in tight spaces. Stay in front of it for too long and the bite chain plus side kick force you into over-defending.
interactionWithCreatures: It usually operates with nymphs and the queen as a steady front-line pressure wall.
strategy: It is not mechanically complex, but it is very annoying in tight rooms. Punish the end of the ram, avoid standing in front of it for too long, and remove the nymphs first if they come with it.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Bite: 30. 3-Hit Combo Bite: 25. Side Kick: 25. Headless Ram: 25.

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: A frontal bite used to start close-range pressure.

abilities.name: 3-Hit Combo Bite
abilities.description: It chains several short bites to punish you if you fail to leave its front arc in time.

abilities.name: Side Kick
abilities.description: It kicks sideways to catch players circling around it.

abilities.name: Headless Ram
abilities.description: It throws its whole body forward in a sudden ram that is easy to misread if you get complacent.

bossPhases.label: Phase 1
bossPhases.summary: While it still has its head, the cockroach pressures with quick bites and side kicks to keep you pinned in front of its body.

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: A frontal bite used to start close-range pressure.

abilities.name: 3-Hit Combo Bite
abilities.description: It chains several short bites to punish you if you fail to leave its front arc in time.

abilities.name: Side Kick
abilities.description: It kicks sideways to catch players circling around it.

bossPhases.label: Phase 2
bossPhases.summary: Once it goes headless it becomes clumsier, but also much more linear and dangerous if you let it charge through a corridor.
bossPhases.trigger: Begins once the cockroach loses its head and enters its headless stretch.

abilities.name: Headless Ram
abilities.description: It throws its whole body forward in a sudden ram that is easy to misread if you get complacent.
